items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:4`
`Compared with version 2.0.2`

The last **released** stable version of this package was `2.0.3` (released 2025-08-22), not `2.0.2`. The generation tool appears to have selected the wrong baseline version — it skipped `2.0.3` and compared against `2.0.2` instead. (The unreleased `2.0.4` entry was correctly ignored, but `2.0.3` was a published release.)

**Fix:** Update this line to read `Compared with version 2.0.3`, and report the incorrect baseline selection in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found. The CHANGELOG compares with `2.0.2` but the last released stable version was `2.0.3` (2025-08-22); the generation tool selected the wrong baseline. All other checks pass: no alpha versions, client name unchanged (`ManagementGroupsAPI`), no stable `KnownVersions` removed, no constructor parameters dropped, no naming anti-patterns (`_N`, `AutoGenerated`, `_` prefix), no problematic `unknown` return types, `void` used appropriately only on delete operations, and no `ae-forgotten-export` warnings.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37796,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/managementgroups/arm-managementgroups/CHANGELOG.md","line":4,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-comparison-baseline","description":"CHANGELOG says 'Compared with version 2.0.2' but the last released stable version was 2.0.3 (2025-08-22). The generation tool selected the wrong baseline, skipping the 2.0.3 release."}]}
```

</details>
